title: WarpDrive Addon GC for Cours
body:
WarpDrive Addon GC for modpack Cours.

The mod adds author's buildings in space and links progress with other modifications.
We tried to use various options for space innovations to diversify the build and add missing content.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The WarpDrive mod adds sci-fi technology to minecraft including but not limited to resource gathering (mining asteroids in space), transportation (moving your team or your entire base across dimensions) and combat (fighting other ships and bases with a laser) . guns or other mods).

Modpack Сours is aimed at the development of the player in a world entirely tied to the most complex technologies. The result of such an adventure is the conquest of space and its expanses.
